items.title: Portugal coach: 'No one should doubt' Ronaldo could play 2030 World Cup - Deadspin
items.summary: + FIFA World Cup Betting Sites. + World Cup Golden Boot Betting. + World Cup Golden Glove Betting. + Free Sports Betting for Real Money. + Crown Coins Casino Promo Code. + Real Prize Casino Promo Code. + High 5 Casino Promo Code. + Social Betting and Casino Promo Codes. With Cristiano Ronaldo set to be 45 years old when Portugal hosts the 2030 World Cup alongside Spain and Morocco, one might think it's unlikely that he'll be on the squad for what would be his seventh World Cup. But don't tell that to Portugal's manager Roberto Martinez. He led Portugal to the 2016 European Championship and to a fourth-place finish at the 2006 World Cup, the country's best finish at a World Cup since a third-place showing in 1966. A penalty-kick goal against Ghana at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar made him the first player to score at five different World Cups. ### Top MLB Picks for Thursday: May 28 Baseball Betting Predictions and Props.

items.title: 10 players to watch at the World Cup - Chicago Tribune
items.summary: Soccer |   10 players to watch at the World Cup. # 10 players to watch at the World Cup. Two of soccer’s all-time greats will likely make their final bows on the sport’s biggest stage at the 2026 World Cup. Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo can finally pass the baton on to a new generation including Spain’s Lamine Yamal. Kylian Mbappé — who was only 19 when he won the World Cup with France in 2018 — is still waiting to confirm his place as the heir-apparent to Messi and Ronaldo. He should have a good shot at this year’s Ballon d’Or — awarded annually to the best player in the world — if he can lead France to another World Cup title after topping the scoring charts in Spain and leading the way in the Champions League. He went on to lead the club to its 15th Champions League title and the Spanish title in his first season at the club before driving England to the final of the Euros with one of the goals of the tournament on the way.

He should have a good shot at this year's Ballon d'Or — awarded annually to the best player in the world — if he can lead France to another World Cup title after topping the scoring charts in Spain and leading the way in the Champions League. Bellingham is a matchwinner capable of unforgettable moments on the biggest stage and despite an underwhelming season at Madrid, he will be one of England's biggest hopes as it aims to win a major title for the first time since 1966.

With Cristiano Ronaldo set to be 45 years old when Portugal hosts the 2030 World Cup alongside Spain and Morocco, one might think it's unlikely that he'll be on the squad for what would be his seventh World Cup. But don't tell that to Portugal's manager Roberto Martinez. He led Portugal to the 2016 European Championship and to a fourth-place finish at the 2006 World Cup, the country's best finish at a World Cup since a third-place showing in 1966. A penalty-kick goal against Ghana at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar made him the first player to score at five different World Cups. ### Top MLB Picks for Thursday: May 28 Baseball Betting Predictions and Props.

items.title: 10 players to watch at the World Cup - Chicago Tribune
items.summary: Soccer |   10 players to watch at the World Cup. # 10 players to watch at the World Cup. Two of soccer’s all-time greats will likely make their final bows on the sport’s biggest stage at the 2026 World Cup. Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo can finally pass the baton on to a new generation including Spain’s Lamine Yamal. Kylian Mbappé — who was only 19 when he won the World Cup with France in 2018 — is still waiting to confirm his place as the heir-apparent to Messi and Ronaldo. He should have a good shot at this year’s Ballon d’Or — awarded annually to the best player in the world — if he can lead France to another World Cup title after topping the scoring charts in Spain and leading the way in the Champions League. He went on to lead the club to its 15th Champions League title and the Spanish title in his first season at the club before driving England to the final of the Euros with one of the goals of the tournament on the way.

items.summary: # 10 players to watch at the World Cup. Two of soccer's all-time greats will likely make their final bows on the sport's biggest stage at the 2026 World Cup. Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo can finally pass the baton on to a new generation including Spain's Lamine Yamal. Kylian Mbappé — who was only 19 when he won the World Cup with France in 2018 — is still waiting to confirm his place as the heir-apparent to Messi and Ronaldo. He should have a good shot at this year's Ballon d'Or — awarded annually to the best player in the world — if he can lead France to another World Cup title after topping the scoring charts in Spain and leading the way in the Champions League. Bellingham is a matchwinner capable of unforgettable moments on the biggest stage and despite an underwhelming season at Madrid, he will be one of England's biggest hopes as it aims to win a major title for the first time since 1966.
